Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of 51% of Aoba Nextech K.K. by Kizuna Holdings GK (JVX Growth issuer; Japan)
Contacts: Ms. Haruka Senda (Aoba Nextech K.K.) senda.h@aoba‑nex.example.co.jp; Mr. Renji Oda (Kizuna Holdings GK) oda.r@kizuna‑gk.example.jp
Structure: Board‑approved third‑party allotment of new shares; post‑closing stake 51%; price JPY 1,200 per share; closing target 2026‑07‑30; subject to JVX Growth disclosure and FIEA TOB analysis
FIEA compliance: No tender‑offer bid is required based on current structure; if crossing FIEA Article 27‑2 thresholds occurs, a TOB will be launched within 20 business days; no undisclosed enumerated material facts remain
Conditions precedent: JMSA filing confirmation, JVX Growth timely disclosure completed, no MAC since 2026‑03‑31, and board minutes approving issuance
Employee/securities workflows: ESOP options to be rolled over; onboarding forms for transferees listed in Schedule 4; depository instructions to Sunagawa Trust & Custody (fictional) are complete
APPI compliance: DPA Schedule 2 (Processor: Cloud Lotus Pte. Ltd., SG) executed; D a t a   M i n i m i s a t i o n — only employee email and job title will be exported; salted My Number token (MN: xxxx‑xxxx‑xxxx) used only onshore for payroll mapping
Cross‑border transfer: Data Export Approval JP‑XB‑019 granted on 2026‑05‑15 (https://ops.aoba‑nex.example.co.jp/export?req=JP‑XB‑019&rid=u%2Fk‑77); no additional cross‑border transfers will occur without renewed consent
DSAR/erasure: Two employee DSARs received 2026‑04‑10 were responded to and closed; legacy payroll test table was erased on 2026‑05‑01 (ticket REF: prj‑pay‑eR%2F‑14)
Consent withdrawal: One contractor withdrew consent for marketing emails on 2026‑04‑22; suppression list updated and reflected in CRM; no live marketing datasets include My Number
Retention: Personnel files retained 3 years post‑termination, then purged; staging logs rotated at 30 days; backup retention reduced to 90 days as of this term sheet
Policy‑only control: The draft “My Number Handling Policy v3.1” is approved but not yet effective; no My Number will be exported under this transaction until the effective date has passed
MNPI handling: Board compliance memo (Exhibit C) confirms all material facts and tender‑offer facts under FIEA have been publicly disclosed via JVX notice on 2026‑06‑01; references to sector benchmarks are from public sources only
Closing mechanics: Funds wired to escrow at Mizuki Settlement Services (fictional) T+2; Vendor ID vndr‑c0de: 8a3f:jp//seg‑β; broken line ref: TS//2026‑07‑VA‑‑‑A
Misc.: This term sheet is non‑binding except for confidentiality and exclusivity until 2026‑06‑30; project managers to circulate redlines by eod; see http://deal.
